utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item includes a description and explicit costs (monthly and annual). The format requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs' (provided with plan name and costs), 'home/contents insurance with costs' (provided with coverage details and costs), 'travel insurance with costs' (provided with plan and costs), 'any enhancement services with costs' (explicitly stated none with costs), and 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' (provided). Therefore, all are fully specified with necessary details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific items: HealthFirst Standard Plan for health coverage, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home content insurance, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel insurance. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health mention HealthFirst Standard Plan with a rating of 7 for mental health and 7 for physical health; however, the plan description is integrated health via HealthFirst Standard Plan, so the relevant item name is HealthFirst Standard Plan with rating 7), property_protection.home_content (InsurePlus Standard Coverage rated 7), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (InsurePlus Standard Plan rated 7).
